name: python3-django-guardian
title: python3-django-guardian
summary: per object permissions of django for Python3
description:
per object permissions of django for Python3
For Python3.
Implementation of per object permissions as authorization backend which is
supported since Django 1.2. It provides features as followings;
- Object permissions for Django_
- AnonymousUser support
- High level API
- Heavely tested
- Django's admin integration
- Decorators
